courseGroups.name: Core Courses
courseGroups.ruleText: Complete all four 3-credit Core Courses (12 credit points).

courses.name: Introduction to Education Policy and Management
Educational Governance and Policy Analysis
Education Leadership and Management: Evidence, Theory and Practice
Research Methods for Data-driven Decision-making in Education Policy and Management

courseGroups.name: Elective Courses
courseGroups.ruleText: Choose any four of the nine 3-credit Elective Courses (12 credit points). The published pool is not a guarantee that every elective will run in every semester.

courses.name: Creating Policy Communities for Innovation in and beyond Education
Educational Innovation: From Ideas, Research-based Evidence to Impact
Strategic AI Integration for Education Leaders and Managers
Emerging Technologies, Ethics, and Governance in Education
Inequality in Education
Education Futures
Administration and Management in World-class Universities
Teacher Leadership and School Improvement
Independent Project for Research in Education Policy and Management

courseGroups.name: Elective Courses
courseGroups.ruleText: Choose any four of the seven 3-credit Elective Courses (12 credit points). This Chinese-medium pool excludes PFS6060 and PFS6062, which appear only on the English-medium Programme page. The published pool is not a guarantee that every elective will run in every semester.
